question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Orly will be higher on each resolution date listed below than on 2026-04-12?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.07149.D once the data is published.

The exact value on 2026-04-12 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2026-04-02) was 10.463. (The daily average temperature at the French weather station at Orly.)
background: The history of Average temperature by day and by station for France - Degree Celsius - ORLY - Daily from Météo-France is available at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.07149.D.
